mentions.note: Caller Arthur asked about holding; Cramer worried about China manufacturing exposure, inexplicable decline, and large short position creating outlook confusion.
Cosmetics group deeply troubled; individual company strength can't overcome sector weakness. Can't buck a bad milieu.
Weakness reflects overdone China-tariff concerns; hold for now, with a Supreme Court tariff win worth ~25 points of upside.
Hold despite erratic swings; has faith it can go higher, but wait for better clarity.
